scheme_name: Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik (UDAN) Yojana - Uttarakhand
page_title: Ude Desh ka Aam Nagrik (UDAN) Yojana - Uttarakhand

details: The scheme “UDAN Yojana” is implemented by Uttarakhand Civil Aviation Development Authority, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to make air travel affordable and accessible for all citizens, enhance regional connectivity within Uttarakhand and promote tourism.
benefits: Under this scheme, the minimum one-way fare per person for helicopter services on the following routes is:
eligibility: The beneficiary must be an Indian citizen.

online: To avail of this benefit, tickets can be booked online or by visiting the offices of the respective helipads. For online booking, you must provide your Aadhaar card, mobile number, and pay the fare. The website for online ticket booking is
Updated information can be obtained from the Uttarakhand Civil Aviation Development Authority website:

faqs.question: Who can avail the benefits under this scheme?
faqs.answer: All Indian citizens are eligible to avail of helicopter services under this scheme.

faqs.question: What types of services are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides helicopter services on selected routes within Uttarakhand at subsidized fares.

faqs.question: How can I book a ticket under UDAN Yojana?
faqs.answer: Tickets can be booked online through https://booking.pawanhans.co.in/ or by visiting the offices of the respective helipads.

faqs.question: What details are required for online booking?
faqs.answer: You need to provide your Aadhaar card, mobile number, and pay the fare to book tickets online.

faqs.question: Can I check updated fares and routes?
faqs.answer: Yes, updated information on fares and routes can be obtained from the UCADA website: https://ucada.in /.
